overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking through a foggy mountain canyon at dusk. The character carries a large backpack with glowing blue lights as they traverse rocky terrain, transitioning from an enclosed canyon to an open valley with dramatic purple skies before darkening into a rainy blue hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow foggy canyon with high rocky walls on both sides, carrying a large backpack with glowing blue lights

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall rising vertically on the left side
steep rocky canyon wall rising vertically on the right side
large dark boulder sitting in the middle of the path ahead
patches of dry grass and small bushes along the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, foggy canyon with steep rocky walls enclosing the path. The protagonist walks forward on a dirt trail surrounded by sparse dry vegetation, with limited visibility due to heavy fog. The atmosphere is dark and enclosed, with no sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from enclosed canyon to open mountain valley

events.description: canyon walls recede and terrain opens up to reveal distant mountains and sky
sky becomes visible showing purple and pink hues breaking through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon opens into a wider valley, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: layered mountain silhouettes visible in the far distance through the fog
dramatic purple and pink colored sky becoming visible as the fog lifts

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from enclosed canyon to open valley as the camera moves forward. The steep canyon walls give way to lower rocky slopes, revealing a dramatic purple sky and distant mountain ranges. The lighting shifts as the fog lifts slightly, exposing the expansive landscape ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with expansive sky views

events.description: sky reaches peak purple and pink coloration with dramatic cloud formations

agents.ego_description: walking across the open valley floor with expansive views of the surrounding mountains

entered.detail: large dark boulders and rock outcrops scattered across the valley floor
wide flat valley bottom with sparse grass and rocky patches

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide mountain valley with full visibility of the dramatic purple and pink sky. The character walks across the open valley floor surrounded by scattered boulders and distant mountain silhouettes. The lighting is at its most colorful during this segment, with the fog cleared to reveal the expansive landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley during blue hour with timefall rain

events.description: lighting shifts to dark blue as dusk settles and visibility decreases
vertical rain streaks become visible indicating timefall has begun

agents.ego_description: continuing through the valley as darkness falls and rain begins to fall

entered.detail: vertical streaks of rain falling from the darkened sky
large dark circular shape visible in the clouds above

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the valley darkening into blue hour with a dramatic shift to low light conditions. The purple sky fades to dark blue and gray as vertical rain streaks become visible. The character continues walking through the increasingly dark and rainy environment with a large dark circular object visible in the sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy canyon that gradually opens into an expansive mountain valley. It begins on a narrow dirt trail enclosed by steep rocky walls and sparse dry vegetation, where heavy fog severely limits visibility and hides the sky. As the camera moves forward, the oppressive canyon walls begin to recede and give way to lower rocky slopes. The scene then expands as the fog lifts, revealing a dramatic purple sky and distant mountain ranges that stretch across the horizon. This transition shifts the atmosphere from a dark, enclosed corridor to a wide, open landscape under the glow of dusk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide mountain valley that transforms from a vibrant, colorful dusk into a dark and rainy blue hour. It begins with the character walking across an open valley floor under a dramatic purple and pink sky, where the fog has cleared to reveal scattered boulders and distant mountain silhouettes. As the character continues forward, the vivid colors of the atmosphere gradually fade, shifting the lighting toward deep blues and grays. The scene then transitions into low light conditions as vertical rain streaks begin to fall across the landscape. Finally, the environment darkens completely, leaving the character to traverse the rainy terrain beneath a large, dark circular object looming in the sky.
